name: Priyanka Rao
description:
Priyanka Rao, a stressed Mother of two and a Wife of twenty years was looking forward to the vacation.

She hadn’t been on a real vacation in over ten years, and now, here she was—at the breathtaking Paradise Beach Resort at the Bahamas, where the sand felt like warm silk beneath her toes and the sea shimmered a clear blue.

It was everything she had dreamed of and more.

But.. even as she enjoyed the postcard-perfect scenery, the vacation couldn’t have gone perfectly for her.

Her suitcase, packed with her carefully chosen outfits, hats, and most importantly her modest swimsuit—had been lost somewhere between airports.

With nothing else to wear, she’d been forced to pick up something last minute from the resort boutique: a swimsuit far more revealing than she’d ever consider wearing.

Her family had a wide range of emotions when they saw her wearing it.. but there was nothing she could do now.

She wasnt going to spend her vacation at her room because her husband lost her bag.. if he was mad at how she is dressed now then he should have taken care of her suit case.

Its fine.. sure she was getting some attention while she was walking on the beach and sunbathing, but its fine.

Its not like anything else can happen.. right?

×_×_×_×_×_×

Based on a real life story, please enjoy and give me any feedback
